name: Oyster St. Laurent
recipeInstructions:
A favorite recipe of former Canadian Prime Minister Louis St. Laurent.
With fresh oysters, cover with water and boil, saving the juices. (With frozen or canned oysters, save the liquor). In a saucepan, mix milk, butter, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil. Add oysters and simmer for 20 minutes, tasting frequently. Add juice or liquor at the last minute; bring to a boil and serve. Will serve 4.
SOURCE: The Prime Minister's Cook book by Susan Cartwright and Alan Edmonds
posted by Anne MacLellan
